question: Using the 2017-2022 year with the lowest RGRTA ridership, form the school-year window from three years before through one year after. Among Texas counties that are top five by average summer meal program sites in that window, what is the highest average site count, rounded to the nearest integer? Report only the rounded number in `Number` format. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Summing Ridership across all subsidiaries by Year for 2017-2022, the minimum total is 7778388 in 2021.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2022 has the lowest total ridership reported by the Rochester Genesee Regional Transportation Authority? (Sum Ridership by Year across all subsidiaries and select the minimum.)

2.fact: In 2018-2019 (<node_1 answer> - 3 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1052), DALLAS (1014), HIDALGO (494), BEXAR (411), TARRANT (367).
2.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> - 3 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 3>-<node_1 answer - 2 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

3.fact: In 2019-2020 (<node_1 answer> - 2 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1919), DALLAS (1479), BEXAR (1038), TARRANT (688), HIDALGO (515).
3.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> - 2 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 2>-<node_1 answer - 1 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

4.fact: In 2020-2021 (<node_1 answer> - 1 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (2674), DALLAS (1504), BEXAR (1168), TARRANT (1033), HIDALGO (700).
4.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> - 1 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 1>-<node_1 answer (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

5.fact: In 2021-2022 (<node_1 answer> school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1825), DALLAS (1545), BEXAR (814), TARRANT (757), HIDALGO (526).
5.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer>-<node_1 answer + 1 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

6.fact: In 2022-2023 (<node_1 answer> + 1 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1016), DALLAS (688), BEXAR (364), HIDALGO (353), TARRANT (303).
6.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> + 1 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer + 1>-<node_1 answer + 2 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Year with lowest RGRTA ridership (2017-2022) -> 2021
Derived school year range: 2018-2019 through 2022-2023 (node_1 answer - 3 to node_1 answer + 1 school years)
AGGREGATION: Compute average across all 5 years -> Top 5 are {HARRIS: 1697.2, DALLAS: 1246.0, BEXAR: 759.0, TARRANT: 629.6, HIDALGO: 517.6}
Result: Highest average is Harris at 1697.2 -> rounded to 1697
